options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: include_stats_skills_psi
options.display_name: Include Tech Skills, Weapon Skills, Stats, and Psi
options.description: Include Technical Skills, Weapon Skills, Statistics, Psi Tier unlocks, and Psi ability unlocks.

options.name: include_os_upgrades
options.description: Include OSUpgrades.

options.name: remove_duplicate_locations
options.description:
Drastically reduces the amount of locations by removing extra locations with the same name and locations close together.
Does not affect chemicals if that option is on.  Removes all unneccesary audio logs, reduces amount of some weapons, and compresses consumables.

options.name: randomize_code_art
options.description:
Randomize where to find the art code for the transmitter.  All 4 pieces of the code need to be seen to activate the transmitter. Unchecked art that could have part of the code have an icon on the map.
If this option is off the 4 locations are: 2 in Rec A, 1 near the safe behind the reception desk, 1 in a crew quarters room on the 2nd floor.
1 in Rec B in the pool room.  1 in Rec C in the artechnology store.  If this option is set to recreation the 7 extra locations are:  2 in Rec A inside crew quarters rooms on the 2nd floor.
1 in Rec B in the dining room where the lights turn off.  4 in Rec C in the artechnology store.  If this option is set to anywhere there are 9 more locations in medsci 2,
1 more in eng a, 1 more in hydro b/c, 15 more in ops b.

options.name: include_chemicals
options.description: Include chemicals and manifests.

options.name: include_starting_wrench
options.description: Include the wrench found on the first body in medsci.

options.name: death_link
options.description:
Whenever anyone with Death Link on dies, all other players in the multiworld with Death Link on die as well. If enabled here it can be toggled on/off during the run in the client.
    When using deathlink I recommend limiting your saving in some way like only saving after level transitions to avoid invalidating deathlink.

options.name: victory
options.description: Victory condition, options are: defeat Shodan(default), defeat The Many, get to the many level, or get to the rickenbacker level.

options.name: randomize_enemies
options.description:
Randomizes enemies.  It is recommended to stay on as this mod's balance is different from vanilla's.
If turned off the early game will be much more difficult, especially if the starting wrench is randomized, and the mid-late game will be too easy.

options.name: elite_enemies
options.description: Enemies can potentially be elite, having increased health and various buffs and effects along with bonus loot. Only works if Randomize Enemies is on.

options.name: randomize_replicators
options.description: Randomizes contents and prices of replicators.  Forces a Psi hypo to be in the MedSci Xerxes room replicator.  Intended to stay on but not integral.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.
